fetch_defaults.user_agent_rotation: forbidden — single identified UA, never rotated
fetch_defaults.never_circumvent_bot_walls: no proxy rotation, no fingerprint spoofing, ever [V-Q3 cond. 1]
fetch_defaults.structured_endpoints_first: HTML only for docs pages with no API [V-Q3 cond. 2]
fetch_defaults.probe_accounts: dedicated probe-only API accounts per provider, isolated from everything else [V-Q3 cond. 6]
fetch_defaults.website_auth: never authenticate on any website host (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral explicit per sweep §2.4)
fetch_defaults.archives: verbatim fetch archives private; sha256 manifests public
fetch_defaults.audit_log: request-level (host, timestamp, status, UA, conditional-GET result), rolled up weekly into the public Ledger [V-Q3 cond. 7]

global-bot-wall-revocation.action: treat as revocation: auto-halt host, escalate to exceptions queue, never circumvent

global-uncleared-redirect.trigger: redirect resolving to a host not registered and cleared in this file
global-uncleared-redirect.action: suspend source_id; require fresh ToU clearance before re-enable

global-robots-stance-diff.trigger: scheduled robots.txt re-fetch diffs a stance change (incl. Content Signals)
global-robots-stance-diff.action: open exceptions-queue item on any change [V-Q3 cond. 7]

watch: https://aws.amazon.com/terms/ — Site Terms CC BY-SA 4.0 documentation carve-out sentence
aws-carveout.fetch_via: wayback-default; direct only on counsel sign-off (sweep dissent B2)
aws-carveout.trigger: carve-out sentence removed or modified, or AUP change (sweep dissents B1/B3)
aws-carveout.action: verdict lapses to EXCLUDE: mark all docs.aws.amazon.com sources excluded=true; collector auto-switches to aws-bedrock-listfoundationmodels lifecycle fields + aws-bedrock-pricelist-api diffs; no GitHub fallback (awsdocs Bedrock mirrors retired 2023)

anthropic-canonical-drift.trigger: host or canonical-URL drift on pinned pages; change in /docs/en/release-notes/api 307-alias behavior
anthropic-canonical-drift.action: log full redirect chain every fetch; alert on host/canonical drift (sweep §2.2)

google-cross-host-redirect.action: treat as new-host event: suspend source + fresh clearance (sweep §2.4)

mistral-legal-hub-watch.trigger: new policy document appears on the hub (can appear without a robots.txt change)
mistral-legal-hub-watch.action: open exceptions-queue item; route new document to ToU clearance (sweep §2.3)

xai-content-signals.trigger: Content-Signal change (current stance: docs.x.ai ai-train=no, ai-input=yes; x.ai ai-input=no)
xai-content-signals.action: honor immediately; ai-input=no means deterministic pipeline only, no LLM ingestion at any stage; open exceptions-queue item on change

conditions.notes: developers.openai.com robots.txt permits (sweep verdict CONDITIONAL); Services Agreement entity-separation condition pending (sweep open item 2).

sources.entitlement_caveat: models list is account/tier-scoped; absence ≠ retirement (§1.4 rule c carve-out)

conditions.notes: Dedicated probe-only API account [V-Q3 cond. 6].

sources.exclusion_reason: 403 WAF — never fetch (design.md §1.3 matrix); never circumvent [V-Q3 cond. 1]. Carve-out: /policies/* compliance sources are registered as policy-page records fetched via Wayback only.

conditions.notes: robots.txt re-check cap ≤24h per sweep §2.4 (hourly every-cycle satisfies it); never fetch /api/* on platform.claude.com; never authenticate (sweep §2.2).

sources.entitlement_caveat: models list is account/tier-scoped; absence ≠ retirement (§1.4 rule c carve-out)

conditions.notes: Dedicated probe-only API account [V-Q3 cond. 6].
PINNED by ToU sweep §2.2: /docs/en/release-notes/api is only a 307 alias of this URL. Log redirects; alert on host/canonical drift. Never fetch /api/* on platform.claude.com; never authenticate.

Replaces anthropic-status-{summary,incidents} (registry 0.1.2, 2026-07-07). status.claude.com/robots.txt disallows /api/ (verified live 2026-07-07; PHASE0-STATUS.md structural finding 1 / addendum), so the /api/v2/*.json Statuspage endpoints have no robots-compliant fetch path and fetchkit refuses them pre-I/O. history.atom is the Statuspage incident-history feed (Allow-listed by robots.txt) and is now the SOLE Anthropic status source — thinner detail than the JSON API is accepted: no structured components/impact, and the latest per-incident lifecycle status is parsed from the entry content HTML (extraction rule statuspage-atom-v1). failover null (no JSON companion remains): a stale or unreachable feed degrades the status_anthropic collector and is surfaced in the run report per registry staleness conventions; never circumvent (global-bot-wall-revocation).
ai.google.dev content is CC BY 4.0 — attribute with modification notices (sweep §2.4); text-only excerpting, no Google branding.
cloud.google.com is UNLICENSED — minimal excerpts only (sweep verdict); archives never published (sweep open item 6, condition 8 pending); text-only excerpting, no Google branding.

sources.entitlement_caveat: models list is account/tier-scoped; absence ≠ retirement (§1.4 rule c carve-out)

conditions.notes: Auth via x-goog-api-key header ONLY — key in query string is forbidden by the fetch library (design.md §1.5). Dedicated probe-only API account [V-Q3 cond. 6].
CC BY 4.0 with modification notices (sweep §2.4).
AWS Price List Bulk API is the ONLY authorized AWS pricing source [V-Q3 cond. 8, recorded in 00-validation-report.md §2 Q03]. Conditional GET mandatory (large file).

sources.entitlement_caveat: region-scoped listing (us-east-1 pinned); absence in one region ≠ retirement (§1.4 rule c carve-out)

conditions.notes: Bedrock ListFoundationModels (SigV4, dedicated probe-only account). Lifecycle fields are the designed fallback if the docs.aws.amazon.com carve-out lapses (sweep §2.1).

CLEARED conditionally under the AWS Site Terms CC BY-SA 4.0 documentation carve-out (sweep §2.1) — the carve-out overrides the Site Terms scraping ban. Attribution: attribute + license-link + ShareAlike, or short unmodified quotes; note CC BY-SA §6(a) auto-termination. Crawl-delay ≥5s. Text-only excerpting, no logos/trade dress. If carve-out lapses: excluded=true, fall back to ListFoundationModels lifecycle + Price List diffs.
Same clearance and conditions as aws-bedrock-doc-history (sweep §2.1): CC BY-SA 4.0 carve-out, Crawl-delay ≥5s, weekly carve-out sentinel, auto-halt on /bedrock/ robots disallow.

sources.exclusion_reason: aws.amazon.com HTML excluded — Site Terms scraping ban, unmitigated for marketing/pricing pages [V-Q3 verifier cond. 8; sweep §2.1]. Carve-out: /terms/ and /aup/ weekly compliance fetches only, Wayback-default (policy-aws-terms, policy-aws-aup), direct only on counsel sign-off (dissent B2).

conditions.notes: Azure Retail Prices API is the ONLY Azure OpenAI pricing source. Filter on productName — the serviceName filter returns empty (design.md §1.3). Paginated; hundreds of regional meters collapse into one event per §1.2.2 aggregation rule.

learn.microsoft.com is PRIMARY; raw.githubusercontent.com (azure-ai-docs) is NOT cleared and is NOT a source (sweep §2.4; GitHub host-set clearance is a separate open item 4). Content CC BY 4.0 via azure-ai-docs — attribute with modification notices; no Microsoft branding.
RSS feed — no public JSON status API exists for Azure (design.md §1.3).

sources.exclusion_reason: JS-rendered, robots unverifiable — never scrape [V-Q3 cond. 4; design.md §1.3 matrix].

conditions.notes: MIRROR-PRIMARY for Mistral docs content (sweep §2.4): Apache-2.0, license-clean primary. URL PINNED 2026-07-07 (registry 0.1.3, Phase 1a build): the repo restructured — there is no models-overview markdown anymore; the docs models table is generated from src/schema/models/models/*.ts and index.ts is the authoritative model list, so index.ts is the registered content file. Fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com with conditional GET, mirroring the litellm-model-prices owner-directed override (supersedes the earlier github-rest-api mechanism pin that was gated on the GitHub host-set clearance, sweep open item 4 — revisit both at clearance).

PINNED canonical URL /models/overview (sweep §2.4; supersedes the draft /getting-started/models/models_overview/ path). docs.mistral.ai fetches are liveness/parity checks only — content extraction runs against the Apache-2.0 GitHub mirror. robots.txt is absent (404) on this host; zero scrape/crawl vocabulary in any Mistral ToS (sweep verdict).

Distinct source_id per design.md §1.3: retirement/deprecation dates live in the same models-overview table but have their own versioned extraction rule. Same mirror-primary condition as mistral-models-docs.

conditions.notes: Corroboration only — never a sole source; mirrors provider docs, so it is NOT independent of provider-primary lineage (design.md §1.4). No auth. Structured API endpoint — outside the HTML ToU sweep scope; no sweep file.

model_prices_and_context_window.json fetched directly from raw.githubusercontent.com with conditional GET (owner-directed Phase 0 build instruction, 2026-07-07; supersedes the earlier git-history-diffing pin that was gated on the GitHub host-set clearance, sweep open item 4 — revisit at clearance). Never a sole source; mirrors provider docs (design.md §1.4 independence). No sweep file — GitHub clearance tracked separately.

Sweep §2.3: business-terms URL 307s here. Services Agreement eff. 2026-01-01 §3.3(f)/§14.1(B) amendment pending (open item 2). Feeds policy.changed.

Legal hub covering Commercial ToS (eff. 2025-06-17), Consumer ToS (eff. 2025-10-08), and Usage Policy (sweep §2.3). Direct identified-UA fetch permitted (anthropic verdict: verifier concurred). Feeds policy.changed.

Wayback-default per policy-pages verifier; direct fetch only on counsel sign-off + good-faith provider notice (sweep §2.3, dissent B2, open item 3). Hosts the CC BY-SA 4.0 carve-out sentence watched by the aws-carveout sentinel (dissent B1).
Wayback-default per policy-pages verifier; direct only on counsel sign-off (sweep §2.3). Watched by the aws-carveout sentinel alongside the Site Terms (dissent B3).
Wayback-ONLY (sweep §2.3). Content-Signal ai-input=no: deterministic pipeline, no LLM ingestion at any stage — implement or EXCLUDE (sweep open item 3). Covers all x.ai/legal/* documents.
CC BY 4.0 attribution required on quotes (sweep §2.3). Feeds policy.changed.
CC BY 4.0 attribution required on quotes (sweep §2.3). Google ToS 'may not copy... our services or software' clause ruling pending (sweep open item 6).
learn.microsoft.com Terms of Use, rev. 2025-05-12 (sweep §2.3). Learn TOU has no anti-bot clause (microsoft verdict). Feeds policy.changed.
mistral.ai/terms 301s here (sweep §2.3). Formation-analysis rewrite pending (browsewrap, not signup-only — sweep open item 7).
Monitor the hub itself — new policies can appear without a robots.txt change (sweep §2.3).

Wayback replay of https://aws.amazon.com/terms/ (registry 0.2.0, Phase 1a): the compliant fetch path for the aws-carveout sentinel — policy-aws-terms is wayback-default (sweep dissent B2) and aws.amazon.com is host-excluded, so fetchkit refuses the direct fetch pre-I/O. /web/2/<url> redirects on web.archive.org to the newest snapshot (same host, redirect guard clean). Weekly compliance read for the sentinel job ONLY; never an event source.

Wayback replay of https://aws.amazon.com/aup/ (registry 0.2.0, Phase 1a): same compliant Wayback path as wayback-aws-terms; watched by the aws-carveout sentinel (sweep dissent B3). Weekly compliance read for the sentinel job ONLY; never an event source.
